validate.notes: Docker build, NOP test (reward=0), and Gold test (reward=1) all pass. Rubric judge returns 0.0 due to fundamental mismatch: extract_config_hunks only extracts config/documentation file changes but gold solution modifies TypeScript source files (pg.ts, pg.test.ts). The rubric rules reference source: AGENTS.md but gold solution adds doc comments directly in the TypeScript source. Updated rubric sources to point to pg.ts and added reference fields, but taskforge.extract_config_hunks still returns empty because it doesnt recognize TypeScript files as config files. The gold solution DOES follow the rubric rules (doc comments on exported items, adapter option pattern) but the judge cannot evaluate this. Rubric evaluation returns 0.0 which is a tool limitation, not a gold solution issue.
